details.test: Task 1: Request quote for cheapest sulfate-free FF shampoo base
Task 2: Select 250 ml bottle with lowest MOQ and add 2000 units to quote
Task 3: Create natural skincare sample kit and submit request
Task 4: Schedule custom manufacturing consultation for body lotion
Task 5: Request quote for qualifying men's grooming bundle (2000 units)
Task 6: Save qualifying eco bar soap to favorites
Task 7: Add 30-50 ml amenity shampoo and body wash to hotel project
Task 8: Save qualifying hair care case study to library
Task 9: Create account and save face care quote draft (2500 units)
